criteria.description: publishFeedbackMessage publishes via NIP-59 gift wrap (same wire format as publishDirectMessage)
criteria.notes: Uses the same sealAndWrap + NDKEvent.publish path; implemented and readable in directMessages.ts

criteria.description: Inner rumor carries ['client', 'nostling', <version>] tag when NEXT_PUBLIC_BUILD_VERSION is set
criteria.notes: Reads process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BUILD_VERSION; appends 3-element tag when truthy

criteria.description: Inner rumor carries ['client', 'nostling'] (2-element) when build version is unavailable
Ordinary publishDirectMessage calls carry NO extra marker tags
criteria.notes: publishDirectMessage calls buildChatRumor without extraTags; verified by test asserting tags == [['p', peerPubkeyHex]]
